MOBILE APP FEATURES

Everything your team needs, in their pocket

Powerful features designed specifically for property management professionals working in the field.

⏱

GPS Time Tracking

Employees clock in and out with GPS verification. Know exactly when and where your team is working with real-time location monitoring. Track work hours, breaks, and overtime automatically.

  • ✓One-tap clock in/out from any job site
  • ✓GPS coordinates captured at clock-in & out
  • ✓Break time tracking built-in
  • ✓Full session history with timestamps
  • ✓Take photo, log daily activities & incidents in-app
📍

Live Location & Tracking

See every movement during a shift plotted on an interactive map. Track total distance covered, numbered waypoints, and time at each location — full accountability for every hour.

  • ✓Numbered tracking points on Apple Maps
  • ✓Total distance calculated per shift
  • ✓Clock-in / Clock-out GPS coordinates logged
  • ✓Duration & point-by-point history
  • ✓Geofencing alerts for site boundaries
📸

Photo & Video Documentation

Capture work progress, document issues, and share updates. Photos are tagged, timestamped, and linked to the job site automatically. Switch between feed, gallery, or before/after comparison views.

  • ✓Photo & video capture in-app
  • ✓Feed, Gallery, and B/A comparison views
  • ✓Automatic site tagging & timestamps
  • ✓5,173+ photos documented & counting
  • ✓Secure cloud backup
💬

Team Messaging

Keep your whole team connected with built-in messaging. Company-wide announcements, team group chats, site-specific channels, and direct messages — all in one place with role-based access.

  • ✓Announcements channel for company updates
  • ✓Team Chat for everyone in the company
  • ✓4 site-specific group chats
  • ✓Direct messages with role badges (Manager, Employee)
  • ✓Search contacts instantly
✅

Task Management

Create, assign, and track tasks across your properties. One-tap status updates, recurring tasks, priority levels, comments, and photo attachments — all with Open, In Progress, Pending Review, and Completed states.

  • ✓Regular & recurring task types
  • ✓Open / In Progress / Pending Review / Done
  • ✓Priority levels with visual indicators
  • ✓Comments & photo attachments per task
  • ✓Filter: my tasks or all tasks
📊

Reports & Analytics

Generate professional PDF reports instantly. Photos, payroll, daily activity, incidents, and weekly highlights — all filterable by date range, employee, or site. Export or print in one tap.

  • ✓Photo documentation reports
  • ✓Payroll & timesheet reports
  • ✓Daily Activity & Weekly Highlights PDFs
  • ✓Incident & Daily Log reports
  • ✓Export CSV or Print in one tap
🎙

Voice-Powered Activity Logging

Speak naturally to log activities on the go. Describe who you contacted, what was discussed, any costs, and follow-up needed — the app structures it automatically into categorized activity entries.

  • ✓Hands-free activity logging in the field
  • ✓Auto-categorizes: Calls, Quotes, Inspections, Maintenance
  • ✓Captures contacts, costs & follow-ups
  • ✓Feeds directly into Weekly Highlights PDF
  • ✓After Hours, Maintenance & more categories
⚠️

Safety & Incident Reporting

Report safety incidents instantly from the field. Log injury, near miss, property damage, equipment failure, environmental hazards, vehicle accidents, fire, chemical spills, and more — with voice description support for fast, accurate reporting.

  • ✓9 incident types: Injury, Near Miss, Property Damage & more
  • ✓Describe with Voice — AI-powered for fast entry
  • ✓Job site & specific location tagging
  • ✓Full incident history & PDF reports
  • ✓Tracks open vs resolved incidents
WEB PLATFORM

Full management power on the web

The Condo Super web dashboard gives you a complete view of your operation — employee hours, activity logs, photo feeds, and professional reports.

condosuper.app — Dashboard
Activity Tracker
Time Cards
Photos Feed
Reports
WEEKLY REPORTS

Professional PDFs, generated in seconds

The Weekly Highlights Report automatically compiles all activity log entries, categorizes them (Calls & Emails, Quotes, Inspections, Maintenance, After Hours), and generates a print-ready PDF with executive summary, status tracking, and your company branding.

  • ✓Executive summary auto-generated
  • ✓Categorized by activity type
  • ✓Completed / Pending / In Progress status
  • ✓Export CSV or Print — one tap
